summary: Aligned the club-scene cover name with the established Anna Kessler continuity and lightly sharpened the closing handoff so the Hartig lead stays active beneath the recognition beat going into Chapter 6.
edits: Changed the in-room cover name from Elena to Anna to match the active Kessler alias.
Adjusted Margarethe's address to use the same cover name.
Added a brief closing line that keeps the operational lead present under the final memory-recognition turn.
